fieldData.name: 40% OFF Windows
fieldData.seo-title: 40% Off Windows | Limited-Time Offer – Deluxe Windows Bay Area
fieldData.opengraph-title: 40% Off Windows | Limited-Time Offer – Deluxe Windows Bay Area
fieldData.seo-description: Save 40% on window replacement at Deluxe Windows in San Francisco. Discount requires minimum 3-window purchase. Limited-time Bay Area offer. Request a free estimate.
fieldData.opengraph-description: Save 40% on window replacement at Deluxe Windows in San Francisco. Discount requires minimum 3-window purchase. Limited-time Bay Area offer. Request a free estimate.
fieldData.blog-post-category---description: *30% national window discount requires minimum purchase of 3 Comfort 365 Windows®. Earn up to an additional 10% off with participation in the YES! Program (up to $2,000), making your window discount a total of up to 40% off. ‍

fieldData.name: 40% OFF Doors
fieldData.seo-title: 40% Off Doors | Limited-Time Offer – Deluxe Windows Bay Area
fieldData.opengraph-title: 40% Off Doors | Limited-Time Offer – Deluxe Windows Bay Area
fieldData.seo-description: Save 40% on door replacement at Deluxe Windows in San Francisco. Discount requires minimum 3-window purchase. Limited-time offer for Bay Area homeowners. Get a free quote.
fieldData.opengraph-description: Save 40% on door replacement at Deluxe Windows in San Francisco. Discount requires minimum 3-window purchase. Limited-time offer for Bay Area homeowners. Get a free quote.
fieldData.blog-post-category---description: *30% national door discount requires minimum purchase of 3 Comfort 365 Windows®. Earn up to an additional 10% off with participation in the YES! Program (up to $2,000), making your window discount a total of up to 40% off.

fieldData.name: Senior Citizen Discount
fieldData.seo-title: Senior Citizen Discount | Deluxe Windows – Bay Area
fieldData.opengraph-title: Senior Citizen Discount | Deluxe Windows – Bay Area
fieldData.seo-description: Homeowners 55+ save an additional 5% on window and door replacement at Deluxe Windows in San Francisco. Proof of eligibility required. Request your free Bay Area estimate.
fieldData.opengraph-description: Homeowners 55+ save an additional 5% on window and door replacement at Deluxe Windows in San Francisco. Proof of eligibility required. Request your free Bay Area estimate.
fieldData.blog-post-category---description: Receive an additional 5% off your entire project. Eligible parties must be 55 years of age or older. Proof of eligibility include a state-issued photo ID for proof of age at the time of appointment. Certain restrictions may apply.‍

fieldData.name: Military Discount
fieldData.seo-title: Military Discount on Windows & Doors | Deluxe Windows Bay Area
fieldData.opengraph-title: Military Discount on Windows & Doors | Deluxe Windows Bay Area
fieldData.seo-description: Active duty, reserves, and veterans within 2 years of separation receive an exclusive discount at Deluxe Windows. Thank you for your service. Free quote in San Francisco.
fieldData.opengraph-description: Active duty, reserves, and veterans within 2 years of separation receive an exclusive discount at Deluxe Windows. Thank you for your service. Free quote in San Francisco.
fieldData.blog-post-category---description: Eligible parties include active duty members, reserves and veterans/retirees within 2 years of separation or retirement of the U.S. Air Force, Army, Navy, Marines, National Guard, Space Force or Coast Guard. Proof of eligibility required copy of Leave and Earnings Statement, Delayed Entry/Enlistment (DEP) form, or Veteran/Retiree (DD-214) form and copy of current driver's license. Certain restrictions may apply.
